meaning: n.排列,编队,军队,衣服,大批;vt.部署,穿着,排列
examples: I was constantly ill, with a baffling array of symptoms.
I was confronted with an array of knobs, levers, and switches.
There's a glittering array of glass to choose from at markets.
At the tiny, deli counter-style Monk Bar Chocolatiers, a diet-threatening array of treats is on display.
Fognini showed off his array of spectacular shots, nearly doubling Nadal's total of winners.
